title: Enchant Description
description: A clean and polished enchantment description format you can use for both Vanilla and Enchant Plus enchantments.
body:
![Enchant Description Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d2ce5785d7f84651c246dd625372ecec4ee104.png)

A **simple and clean resource pack** that adds **detailed descriptions** to all enchantments in Minecraft including both **vanilla** and **custom (Enchant Plus)** ones.

### 📘 Features:

* Shows **tooltip descriptions** for each enchantment.
* Support Enchant format upto 256 levels.
* Supports **vanilla enchantments** like *Sharpness*, *Unbreaking*, etc.
* Adds support for **Enchant Plus** custom enchants.
* No mods or datapacks required just drop into `resourcepacks/`.

### 💡 Example Tooltip:

```
Mending >> Repair Item Using experience.
Sharpness >> Increase Melee Damage. V
Looting >> Increase Mob Drop Loot. III
```

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>

1. Place the `.zip` in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder.
2. Enable the pack in the Resource Packs menu.
3. Done! Hover over an enchanted item to see the magic.

</details>
